signal.digest: This schema-valid research block contains a two-node prerequisite cycle and must fail directed acyclic dependency validation.
signal.falsifies_if: The semantic validator accepts a prerequisite cycle as valid.

premise.content: The first node claims to precede the second node.

claim.content: The second node simultaneously claims to precede the first node.

negative_space: Does not forbid cycles made only of non-dependency edges

must_not: Dependencies require themselves through a cycle
